subcodes.first_line: I cherish the hope that thou mayest be adorned, as is befitting and proper, with such virtues and excellences as are the true adornment of human reality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اميدوارم که چنان که بايد و شايد به خصائل و فضائلی متّصف باشی که زينت حقيقت انسانيّه است
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @evolution; human evolution
